TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kyu'ang ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 20 buwan, 40 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 36 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 75%, Tayan 15%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kyu'ang hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kyu'ang hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kyu'ang hya' llyung. tay mkraya' na Kyu'ang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kyu'ang hya' ga Oro'raw. tay mkyahu' na Kyu'ang hya' Kawabata. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kjuʔaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kjuʔaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kjuʔaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kjuʔaŋ ħjaʔ lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kjuʔaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kjuʔaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa oroʔraw. taj mkjaħuʔ na kjuʔaŋ ħjaʔ kawaβata. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kyu'ang ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 20 buwan, 40 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 36 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 75%, Tayan 15%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kyu'ang hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kyu'ang hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kyu'ang hya' llyung. tay mkraya' na Kyu'ang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kyu'ang hya' ga Oro'raw. tay mkyahu' na Kyu'ang hya' Kawabata. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kjuʔaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kjuʔaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kjuʔaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kjuʔaŋ ħjaʔ lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kjuʔaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kjuʔaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa oroʔraw. taj mkjaħuʔ na kjuʔaŋ ħjaʔ kawaβata. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
